channel.title: NAY Feng, J Huang, C Qu, M Huang, Z Chen, D Tang, Z Xu, B Wang, Z Chen | PlatCOVID
channel.description: NAY Feng, J Huang, C Qu, M Huang, Z Chen, D Tang, Z Xu, B Wang, Z Chen

image.title: NAY Feng, J Huang, C Qu, M Huang, Z Chen, D Tang, Z Xu, B Wang, Z Chen

item.title: Future perspective: high-throughput construction of new ultrasensitive cytokine and virion liquid chips for high-throughput screening (HTS) of anti-inflammatory drugs or clinical diagnosis and treatment of inflammatory diseases.
